name: coconut water powder
description: Coconut water powder provides a concentrated coconut water flavor and natural electrolytes in a shelf-stable powdered form.
raw_text: INGREDIENTS Coconut Water Powder, Citric Acid, Wat: Coconut Water Powder, Citric Acid, Watermelon Flavour (4%)," Bisglycinate, Aquamin F Calcium, Dandelion Root Powder, Him Horsetail Extract, Colour (Beetroot), Steviol Glycosides (Stevi Extract), Vitamin B5 (as Calcium Pantothenate), Black Peppe (95% Piperine), Vitamin B6 (as Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate). DIRECTIONS FOR USE Add one sachet to a minimum of 300ml of still or sparkling w stir and enjoy! | Oven crispy jumbo coconut shrimp: Orange marmalade (high fructose corn syrup, corn syrup, oranges, sugar, citric acid, fruit pectin, sodium benzoate [as a preservative]), water, mustard (distilled vinegar, mustard seed, water, salt, spices, turmeric, natural flavor), horseradish (horseradish, vinegar, water, salt, soybean oil, sugar, flavoring, sodium bisulfite), pepper sauce (aged cayenne pepper, vinegar, salt), dijon mustard bra | Labels: en:fair-trade, en:organic, en:eu-organic, en:fairtrade-international
